text: Hey brother Keith told me the lake trip is November 8 through the 10th. I got a load that needs to deliver on the 7th anyway so that works perfect. Tammy says hi.
Floyd I booked the cabin for Nov 7-9 like we said. Darl might push to the 8th. Let me know.
Floyd your mama called and is confused about her new pill. She says Dr Caldwell put her on atorvastatin 40mg. Is that right because I thought she was on 20mg like you. Call her.
Dad I sent the Ridgemont rate at 4.85 per mile. Their last three loads with us were 4.65 4.70 and 4.75 so I bumped it. Let me know if that is too much.
Dad can you pick me up from practice at 5 on the 24th? Sarah and her parents want to do pictures at their house before the dance.
Floyd I think we have a duplicate in the mentorship applicant list. Jake Sullivan submitted twice with different email addresses. Want me to merge them or leave both?
Daddy the tuition bill this month has an extra $150 for the pre-law society dues. I did not know it would be that much. Sorry. Also I might come home for the cookout. Love you.

Honey I am all mixed up. Dr Caldwell said my cholesterol pill is atorvastatin and I need to take 40 mg now. Is that the same one you take because I do not want us both on the same thing without telling somebody.
